title: Extraction Method C for Skin Samples
author: Faezah Mohd Salleh
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.inbcdan

steps.title: Prior to extraction, individually vortex skin...
steps.instruction: Prior to extraction, individually vortex skin samples in a 10% commercial sodium hypochlorite solution (bleach) solution to decontaminate surface.

steps.title: To remove the bleach subsequently vortexed...
steps.instruction: To remove the bleach subsequently vortexed the samples in 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Finally vortex the samples in H2O
steps.instruction: Finally vortex the samples in H2O.

steps.title: Add the skin samples to 1...
steps.instruction: Add the skin samples to 1 mL digestion buffer consisting of 10 mM tris(hydroxymethyl)aminomethane hydrochloride (Tris-HCl) (pH 8.0), 10 mM NaCl, 2% w/v sodium dodecyl sulfate (SDS), 5 mM CaCl2, 2.5 mM ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid (EDTA) (pH 8.0), 40 mM dithiothreitol (DTT), and 10% Proteinase K [Gilbert et al. 2007]. Gilbert, M. T. P., Tomsho, L. P., Rendulic, S., Packard, M., Drautz, D. I., Sher, A., ... & Campos, P. F. (2007). Whole-genome shotgun sequencing of mitochondria from ancient hair shafts. science, 317(5846), 1927-1930

steps.title: Incubate the samples for 12 hours at 56°C
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples for 12 hours at 56°C. 12:00:00, Incubation at 56°C

steps.title: In order to purify the DNA...
steps.instruction: In order to purify the DNA from contaminants, first, mix 1mL supernatant with 1mL phenol. undetermined, Phenol

steps.title: Vortex the sample for 20 sec
steps.instruction: Vortex the sample for 20 sec. 00:00:20, Vortexing

steps.title: Gently rotate the sample for 5 min
steps.instruction: Gently rotate the sample for 5 min. 00:05:00, Gentle rotation

steps.title: Centrifuge the sample at 3000 g for 3 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the sample at 3000 g for 3 min. 00:03:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Remove approximately 1mL aqueous liquid and mix with 1mL chloroform
steps.instruction: Remove approximately 1mL aqueous liquid and mix with 1mL chloroform. undetermined, Chloroform

steps.title: Vortex the mixture for 30 sec
steps.instruction: Vortex the mixture for 30 sec. 00:00:30, Vortex

steps.title: Rotate the mixture for 5 min
steps.instruction: Rotate the mixture for 5 min. 00:05:00, Rotation

steps.title: Centrifuge the mixture at 3000 g for 3 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the mixture at 3000 g for 3 min. 00:03:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Remove approximately 1mL aqueous liquid and...
steps.instruction: Remove approximately 1mL aqueous liquid and purify using the MinElute PCR Purification kit (Qiagen, Valencia, CA) according to manufacturer’s instruction with a slight modification: Firstly, modify the PB buffer according to [Allentoft et al. 2015]. Allentoft, M. E., Sikora, M., Sjögren, K. G., Rasmussen, S., Rasmussen, M., Stenderup, J., ... & Malaspinas, A. S. (2015). Population genomics of Bronze Age Eurasia. Nature, 522(7555), 167-172

steps.title: Secondly, increase the volume of PB binding buffer to 10x
steps.instruction: Secondly, increase the volume of PB binding buffer to 10x.

steps.title: Apply the buffer to the spin...
steps.instruction: Apply the buffer to the spin columns following the method developed by [Dabney et al. 2013], use a Zymo-Spin V reservoir (Zymo Research, Irvine, CA) to pass the large buffer volume through the MinElute column. Dabney J, Knapp M, Glocke I, et al (2013) Complete mitochondrial genome sequence of a Middle Pleistocene cave bear reconstructed from ultrashort DNA fragments. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A 110:15758–15763

steps.title: Prior to the final centrifugation, add...
steps.instruction: Prior to the final centrifugation, add 15 μL of EB buffer to the column. undetermined, EB Buffer

steps.title: Incubate for 15 minutes at 37°C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 15 minutes at 37°C. 00:15:00, Incubation at 37°C

steps.title: Centrifugate at 6000 g for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifugate at 6000 g for 1 min. 00:01:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Quantify the extracted DNA using a...
steps.instruction: Quantify the extracted DNA using a Qubit fluorometer with a dsDNA high sensitivity (HS) assay (Life Technologies, Carlsbad, CA).
